profile_backing.full_profile_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

focused_baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2
focused_baseline.source_state: baseline recorded in frankenjax-p1vbf.14 before the full-B transpose edit

candidate.lever: full-B transpose row-major dot layout for matmul_2d
candidate.description: Packed B once into row-major columns with b_transposed[j * k + l] = b[l * n + j], then computed each output cell as a contiguous A-row/B-column dot while preserving l=0..k-1 accumulation order per cell.

proof_test.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-lax matmul_2d -- --nocapture
proof_test.details: 3 tests passed in candidate state: matmul_2d_basic, matmul_2d_ikj_bit_identical_to_ijk, and matmul_2d_b_transpose_matches_ijk_adversarial_bits covering NaN payloads, infinities, and signed zero.

rebench.command: RCH_FORCE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts2 RCH_WORKERS=ts2 rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- linalg/matmul_2d_512x512x512_f64 --noplot --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 2

isomorphism_proof.ordering: Candidate preserved row-major output order and assigned each output cell once.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: N/A: matmul_2d has no comparisons, sorting, or tie-breaking behavior.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Candidate copied B f64 bits into a transposed buffer, then used the same scalar multiplication and sum += product sequence for each output cell with l ascending. It introduced no FMA, reassociation, partial-sum merge, SIMD reduction, mixed precision, or Strassen-style reordering.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A: matmul_2d consumes no random state.
isomorphism_proof.errors: No retained source change; candidate slice indexing remained within matmul_2d during proof tests.

validation.result: pass: source diff empty after restore

alien_source.primitive_family: cache-local dense linear algebra layout transformation
alien_source.applied_slice: Tried full RHS transpose packing after prior register, local-accumulator, packed-panel, and direct-panel GEMM traversal variants failed the score gate.

next_primitive.target: Reprofile and pivot away from bit-exact GEMM traversal variants; attack the next top profile-backed non-GEMM hotspot or file a behavior-contract bead for FP-reordering GEMM algorithms such as blocked microkernels with partial sums or Strassen-like recursion.
next_primitive.reason: Full-B transpose made B reads contiguous but destroyed the i-k-j kernel's streaming C-row update and regressed by 4.50x on the same worker. More bit-exact traversal variants have repeatedly failed, so the next pass must be a different hotspot or a separately proved behavior contract for a fundamentally different numerical algorithm.
proof_obligations: floating-point operation order unchanged unless a separate behavior-contract bead proves exact allowed tolerance
no RNG, tie-breaking, or public error change
next_primitive.fallback_trigger: Reject and restore source if same-worker RCH Criterion does not clear Score>=2.0.
